nasb.text: I also applied myself to the work on this wall; we did not buy any land, and all my servants were gathered there for the work.

esv.text: I also persevered in the work on this wall, and we acquired no land, and all my servants were gathered there for the work.

cnv.text: 我堅持只重修城牆的工程；所以我們不購置田產，我所有的僕人也都聚集在那裡工作。

ccb.text: 我全心修筑城墙，没有购置田产，我的仆人也都参与修建城墙的工作。
